shared_properties: The player leaf keeps a 32x32px footprint and a readable stem in every occupied frame.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #E8722A, background #D4A96A, and accent #F5D060.
The center vein remains the brightest structural cue so timing reactions stay legible over the sepia background.
differences: This base asset defines the neutral fall pose used before braking, steering, or damage states appear.
The loop rotates through a gentle clockwise and counterclockwise sway that matches the relaxed early-stage fall rhythm.
Frame spacing prioritizes stable silhouette readability over extreme deformation.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the core loop, timing windows, obstacle pacing, UI layout, and Bevy target constraints.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_player_sheet
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the player leaf silhouette, glow accent, and frame density for the responsive states.

reference_images.label: leaf_beat_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the sepia autumn atmosphere, tree silhouettes, and warm color layering.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: TextureAtlas-driven sprite entity updated in FixedUpdate for deterministic loop timing.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/character_player_leaf_idle_spin_8f_10fps.png during the Loading state and store the atlas handle in a PlayerArt resource keyed by task_id.
runtime_notes: Keep the entity centered near the camera focus so horizontal drift reads as movement against the obstacle field.
Advance the idle timer at 10fps and snap every frame to whole pixels to preserve crisp veins and lobe edges.
Expose the current atlas frame to combo and judgement systems so perfect feedback can layer without replacing gameplay ownership.

context.usage: Default visible state during the fall loop while the player reads the next rhythm note.

shape.silhouette: Asymmetric maple leaf with a narrow stem, five lobes, and a bright central vein.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 256x32px with 8 frames of 32x32px and 0px spacing.
The stem remains readable as a 2px-wide dark form in every frame and never leaves the 32x32px bounds.
Only the listed colors plus transparency are used, with nearest-neighbor edges and no anti-aliasing.
